title: Rename device - new name in FMD
scenario: Renaming a device in Poly Studio Mobile app Settings > Rename updates the device name displayed in the Find My Device (FMD) list
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap the 'Rename' option (or the pencil/edit icon next to the device name).
4. Enter a new name for the device and confirm/save the change.
5. Exit the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Open the Find My Device (FMD) app or list on the Android device.
7. Locate the entry for the Poly Bluetooth audio device in the FMD list.
8. Observe the device name displayed in the FMD list.
expected: The device name displayed in the Find My Device (FMD) list should reflect the new name entered in step 4, not the previous/original name.
